---
title: 'install-completion'
---

Install the shell-completion script for `xorq` into the standard location for
the chosen shell. After installation, restart your shell (or source the
generated file) to activate completion.

## Usage

```bash
xorq install-completion [SHELL]
```

## Arguments

- **`SHELL`**—One of `bash`, `zsh`, `fish`. If omitted, the shell is detected
  from the `$SHELL` environment variable.

## Install paths

| Shell | Path |
|---|---|
| `bash` | `~/.local/share/bash-completion/completions/xorq` |
| `zsh`  | `~/.zfunc/_xorq` (requires `~/.zfunc` in `fpath`) |
| `fish` | `~/.config/fish/completions/xorq.fish` |

## Examples

```bash
# Detect shell from $SHELL and install
xorq install-completion

# Pin to a specific shell
xorq install-completion zsh
```

After install, the command prints the path it wrote to and the source command
needed to activate completion in the current session.

## See also

- [`completion`](completion.qmd)—print the completion script to stdout
  instead of installing it.
